topPlaces.name: Kharod
topPlaces.description: Kharod is a town and a nagar panchayat in Janjgir-Champa district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh. Kharod is historically very important place as this place is also known as Chhattisgarh ki Kashi.

topPlaces.name: Shivrinarayan
topPlaces.description: Shivrinarayan also known as Sheorinarayan is a town and a nagar panchayat located at the Triveni Dhara of Mahanadi, Shivnath and Jonk River in Janjgir-Champa district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.

topPlaces.name: Jonk River
topPlaces.description: Jonk River is a tributary of Mahanadi River that flows for approximately 210 kilometers through the Nuapada District and Bargarh District in the state of Odisha; and the Mahasamund District and Raipur District in the state of Chhattisgarh in India. The river starts from the Sunabeda plateau and enters Maraguda valley where it is joined by a stream called Gaidhas-nala near Patora village.

items.note: Kharod is a town and a nagar panchayat in Janjgir-Champa district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh. Kharod is historically very important place as this place is also known as Chhattisgarh ki Kashi.

Shivrinarayan also known as Sheorinarayan is a town and a nagar panchayat located at the Triveni Dhara of Mahanadi, Shivnath and Jonk River in Janjgir-Champa district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.

Jonk River is a tributary of Mahanadi River that flows for approximately 210 kilometers through the Nuapada District and Bargarh District in the state of Odisha; and the Mahasamund District and Raipur District in the state of Chhattisgarh in India. The river starts from the Sunabeda plateau and enters Maraguda valley where it is joined by a stream called Gaidhas-nala near Patora village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Indal Deul temple, Kharod?
faq.a: The best time to visit Indal Deul temple, Kharod is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Indal Deul temple, Kharod?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (107 km) and the nearest railway station is Bilaspur Junction (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Indal Deul temple, Kharod?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Indal Deul temple, Kharod at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Indal Deul temple, Kharod?
faq.a: Stays in Indal Deul temple, Kharod start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Indal Deul temple, Kharod?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kharod, Shivrinarayan, Jonk River.
